hero.badge: National High-tech Enterprise · Guangdong Specialized and Innovative Enterprise
hero.title: Smart Mobile E-Health Expert
hero.subtitle: Huizhou BluevitaTech Co., Ltd.
hero.description: Founded in 2015, specializing in R&D and production of smart mobile medical electronics, 5G smart terminals, and IoT products. With 20 years of North American carrier customization experience, FDA medical certification, and Google EDLA enterprise certification, serving the global high-end medical market.

about.title: About BluevitaTech
about.subtitle: Market-oriented, quality-focused. Providing satisfactory products and services, continuously pursuing quality improvement and excellence.
about.mainTitle: Focused on Smart Mobile Healthcare & Communication Terminals
about.p1: Huizhou BluevitaTech Co., Ltd. is located in the National High-tech Industrial Development Zone of Huizhou, Guangdong. Founded in September 2015 with a registered capital of 3 million RMB.
about.p2: The company is a National High-tech Enterprise, Guangdong Specialized and Innovative Enterprise, and Double-Soft Enterprise. Specializing in R&D and production of smart mobile medical electronics, smart mobile communication terminals, and IoT products. Providing enterprise customers with smartphones, tablets, IoT terminals, and data terminals that meet Google EDLA certification, as well as smart medical terminal products with FDA certification.
about.p3: Core team members have years of experience in mobile communication terminal design and integration for European and American markets, as well as medical electronic instrument design and integration. Maintaining long-term cooperation and technical exchanges with renowned units in the biomedical electronics field both domestically and internationally.

global.title: Global Presence
global.desc: Offices in Huizhou, Chengdu, Jiangxi, Hong Kong, and USA

qualification.title: Qualifications
qualification.desc: National High-tech Enterprise, Double-Soft Enterprise, Guangdong Specialized Enterprise

market.title: Market Coverage
market.desc: 80% clients are public companies in North America and Europe

products.title: Product Center
products.subtitle: 9 core products covering mobile communication terminals, 5G IoT modules, and medical smart terminals

tech.title: Core Technology
tech.subtitle: 20 years of technology accumulation, deep integration of broadband mobile communication + internet + AI technology
tech.intro: Enterprise-level smart medical electronics/mobile communication terminal solution provider dedicated to meeting North American market standards. Leveraging deep integration of 4G/5G/6G broadband mobile communication technology + internet + AI technology to achieve cross-dimensional empowerment, providing enterprise customers with high-standard, high-quality smartphones, tablets, IoT terminals, data terminals, and smart medical terminal products.
tech.products: Products support mobile internet system deployment (mobile client + server) and applications, enabling customers to achieve cross-dimensional product expansion.

highlights.team: Core technology team with over 20 years of continuous refinement in mobile terminal platforms
highlights.operator: Focused on high-threshold exclusive customization for North American carriers (Verizon/T-Mobile/AT&T) with dedicated product management, development, and supply systems
highlights.chip: Possesses technology development authorization and support from international mainstream mobile communication terminal chip platforms
highlights.edla: Google EDLA certified, providing smartphones, tablets, IoT terminals, data terminals, and smart medical terminal products for enterprise customers

ai.title: AI Innovation Technology
ai.subtitle: Full integration with Google Gemini for diverse AI empowerment
ai.intro: Leveraging platform NPU/CPU/GPU computing power, supporting various Gemini models to build AI applications and agents. Achieving multimodal construction with seamless reasoning capabilities across text, images, audio, video, and code. From Nano to Ultra models, all have been learned and deployed.

nano.title: Gemini Nano
nano.desc: Efficient on-device inference, low-power AI experience, ideal for mobile terminals and IoT devices

flash.title: Gemini Flash
flash.desc: Ultra-fast response, lightweight task processing, ideal for real-time interaction and quick inference

pro.title: Gemini Pro
pro.desc: Balanced performance and efficiency, ideal for enterprise applications and complex AI tasks

ultra.title: Gemini Ultra
ultra.desc: Maximum computing power, top-tier multimodal capabilities, ideal for high-precision medical AI
